nasb.text: And He caused His people to be very fruitful, And made them stronger than their adversaries.

esv.text: And the Lord  made his people very fruitful and made them stronger than their foes.

cnv.text: 耶和華使他的子民生育眾多， 使他們比他們的敵人更強盛。

ccb.text: 耶和华使祂的子民生养众多， 比他们的仇敌还要强盛。

csbs.text: 耶和华使他的子民生养极多， 使他们比敌人更强盛。
